title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Barbeque Nation

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Barbeque Nation
jsonLd.description:
Barbeque Nation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barbeque Nation:
Barbeque Nation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
